Included in every unit

What You See Is What You Get

Full Interior

Eco wood floors, marble bathroom, custom vanity, bar area — completely finished.

Smart Home

Card-access power, voice control, app door lock, multi-scene lighting — all standard.

Ready in Days

Factory finished and shipped ready. No on-site construction. Move in immediately.

Weather-Proof

Galvanised steel frame, fluorocarbon aluminium shell, tempered glass — built to last outdoors.

Customization

Built to
Your Brief

Our standard models are the starting point. We adjust the layout, exterior finish, interior configuration, and use case to match your project — from a resort glamping pod to a branded tea room.

Layout & Floor Plan

Room divisions, open-plan vs. partitioned, double-layer clusters — all adjustable.

Exterior Design

Custom colours, branded shell panels, themed shapes (Shark Capsule, Apple Cabin, and more).

Interior Fit-Out

Flooring, tile selection, vanity style, lighting packages, furniture layout — your choice.

Use Case

Glamping · Residential · Commercial · Sauna & Wellness · Tea Room · Pop-up Retail.

Discuss Your Project →
Custom — Shark Capsule & Tea Room builds available
About Us

Jiangsu Flower Smart Technology Co., Ltd

We design, manufacture, and deliver fully finished capsule homes from our factory in Changzhou, Jiangsu, China. Every unit leaves our facility complete, furnished, and ready to live in the moment it arrives on site.

Our team covers the full pipeline — research & development, precision manufacturing, and both domestic and international sales networks. We work with resort developers, glamping operators, residential buyers, and commercial clients worldwide.

Factory-finished quality. No on-site construction surprises — what you see in the showroom is what arrives.
Smart by default. Smart home technology is standard on every model, not an add-on.
Fully customisable. From a standard shell to a fully themed bespoke build — we match your brief.
Global export ready. We ship internationally and support international clients end to end.
Get in Touch
Blog

From the Founders

Honest writing about why we build this way, what problem we're solving, and where modular living is headed.

Founder's Note · Vision

Why we build in a factory, not on a construction site

Traditional construction is slow and impossible to scale. We asked: what if a quality home could be manufactured like a precision product?

Read more →
Industry · Hospitality

The demand for resort accommodation is growing faster than builders can supply it

Tourism is recovering globally. Capsule homes deploy in days — here's why that changes everything for resort developers.

Read more →
Design Story · Custom

From standard shell to shark capsule — how a custom build works

A client brief becomes a finished themed capsule home. Walk through a real project from concept to delivery.

Read more →

Included in every unit

Eco wood flooring throughout
Marble / ceramic tile bathroom, privacy glass door, custom vanity, mirror, toilet, shower
Integrated ceiling & wall modules — standard colour palette
Bar area · full lighting system · full plumbing
2P Midea inverter air conditioning (heating & cooling) + hot water heater
Smart card-access power panel + mobile app door lock
Multi-scene lighting control + voice control
Galvanised steel frame · fluorocarbon aluminium shell · tempered glass doors, windows & skylight
Panoramic balcony (applicable models)
